title: ASSISTANT IT MANAGER
description:
Position Overview:

As the Assistant IT Manager at Pathlab Singapore (PLSG), you will play a key supporting role in managing daily IT operations, implementing technical solutions, and maintaining essential infrastructure. This position demands strong hands-on technical skills and troubleshooting abilities, especially within healthcare IT systems. You will contribute to both strategic initiatives and day-to-day tasks under the direction of the Regional IT Manager.

Additionally, you will assist in various projects and assignments as delegated, including but not limited to:


Key Responsibilities:

1. IT Operations Support:

  • Assist in managing the day-to-day operations of IT systems including the LIS, hardware, software, networks, and telecommunications.
  • Perform first-level and second-level troubleshooting to ensure system reliability and uptime.
  • Monitor IT systems to ensure performance, availability, and security compliance.

2. Project & Implementation Support:

  • Provide technical and administrative support for IT projects.
  • Work closely with internal users, vendors, and stakeholders to support project timelines and deliverables.
  • Help track progress and provide regular status updates to the Regional IT Manager.

3. Government Liaison Support:

  • Assist in liaising with technical representatives from Singapore government agencies (e.g., Synapse, HPB) for IT system implementation and interfacing matters.
  • Help manage technical submissions and respond to troubleshooting issues when required.

4. Security & Compliance:

  • Support the implementation of IT security measures and ensure enforcement of existing policies.
  • Help prepare documentation to ensure compliance with Singapore healthcare IT regulations and audit requirements.

5. Software and Integration Support:

  • Assist in managing and testing software development and integration projects (in-house or external).
  • Participate in hands-on development or scripting tasks when needed.
  • Prepare and maintain documentation related to system integrations (e.g., HL7 interface mappings).

6. User Support & Training

  • Provide end-user training or documentation to improve adoption of new systems or updates.
  • Serve as a point of contact for escalated IT support issues from users.

7. Continuous Improvement

  • Recommend process or system improvements based on user feedback or performance metrics.
  • Stay up to date with emerging technologies relevant to healthcare IT.

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum 5 years of experience supporting healthcare or lab IT systems.
  • Proficient in software development with experience in PHP, Python, MySQL, MSSQL, RESTful APIs, and Windows-based application development. Experience in other programming languages or platforms will be an added advantage.
  • Familiarity with scientific instrumentation and documentation processes (e.g., Siemens, Roche systems).
  • Solid understanding of technical concepts such as HL7, TCP/IP communication, software integration, and system configuration.
  • Good written and verbal communication skills.
  • Able to handle multiple assignments and meet deadlines with minimal supervision.

Work Schedule:

  • Monday to Friday: 8.30 am to 5.00 pm
  • Saturday: 8.30 am to 1.00 pm

postedCompany.description: Pathlab Singapore was established in 1952 and have over the decades been providing medical testing services to medical practitioners and specialists in Singapore. Along with our Malaysian counterparts, we have in recent years expanded our business operations to Thailand, Indonesia, Hong Kong, Vietnam, Myanmar and Cambodia. We are fully committed to constantly providing excellent service and accurate results for the industry. We have invested substantially in fully automated laboratory systems that perform our biochemistry tests and immunoassays with high efficiency and reliability. Our current economies of scale enable us to increase the menu of tests offered and frequency of tests resulting in improved turnaround time. Customer satisfaction is of utmost importance to us and we start each workday reminding our operations and service staff to attend to our clients promptly and effectively.
postedCompany.name: PATHOLOGY AND CLINICAL LABORATORY PRIVATE LIMITED
